login.seoDescription: Sign in to your Brokz client workspace.
login.heading: Sign in to Brokz
login.audienceCustomerHint: Broker firms — view your orders, licenses, invoices and tickets.
login.audienceAdminHint: Brokz staff — manage customers, licenses and operations.
login.roleMismatchAdmin: This account doesn't have admin access. Switch to the Customer tab or contact your Brokz admin.
login.roleMismatchCustomer: This is an admin account. Switch to the Admin tab to continue.
login.magicLinkSent: Check your inbox for a sign-in link.
login.noAccount: Brokz is invite-only. Contact your account manager to request access.

errors.genericMagic: We couldn't send the link. Try again in a moment.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

acceptInvite.heading: Welcome to Brokz
acceptInvite.subheading: Set a password to activate your account.

errors.tokenInvalid: This invitation link is invalid or has expired. Ask your account manager to resend it.
errors.generic: We couldn't activate your account. Please try again.

resetPassword.seoDescription: Start a password reset for your Brokz account.
resetPassword.heading: Reset your password
resetPassword.subheading: We'll email you a secure link to set a new password.
resetPassword.success: If that email has a Brokz account, a reset link is on the way.

errors.generic: We couldn't send the link. Please try again.

updatePassword.seoDescription: Choose a new password for your Brokz account.
updatePassword.heading: Set a new password
updatePassword.subheading: Choose something you don't use elsewhere.

errors.sessionMissing: This reset link has expired. Request a new one.
errors.generic: We couldn't update your password. Please try again.
